tips_en: Start with **LingBot-Vision** (Paper 2) — its boundary-centric self-supervised pretraining yields a broadly useful visual foundation model, and its emphasis on structured spatial representations directly connects to **PixWorld** (Paper 1), which also leverages 3D foundation models (π3) for geometric supervision, making the two complementary reads on spatial visual understanding. **UI-MOPD** (Paper 3) is more narrowly scoped to GUI agents and can be read afterward as an applied contribution on continual learning via on-policy distillation.
tips_zh: 建议先阅读 **LingBot-Vision**（论文2）——其以边界为中心的自监督预训练方法产出了一个用途广泛的视觉基础模型，且对结构化空间表征的重视与 **PixWorld**（论文1）利用 3D 基础模型（π3）进行几何监督的做法直接呼应，二者在空间视觉理解主题上互补。**UI-MOPD**（论文3）则更聚焦于 GUI 智能体场景，可作为后续阅读的应用型补充，了解其基于在线策略蒸馏的持续学习方法。
